title: Minimal lite-profile block for schema validation

signal.digest: A minimal lite-profile block containing only the required fields. Used as a golden fixture to validate that the ompu-block v0.2 schema correctly accepts lite blocks without topology, edges, path, or reproduce.
signal.falsifies_if: The v0.2 schema validator rejects this block as invalid.

core_claim.content: Lite-profile blocks require only $self, id, type, title, signal, nodes, and profile.
